title: iria tenera
intro: Iria tenera, also known as Iresine, is a plant species native to South America and is part of the amaranth family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations, among others. Iria tenera can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
